{{Quote|The forces of the Empire are at your command.|IMP-22|<ref name="Rebellion" />}}
'''IMP-22''' was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]]<ref name="Rebellion" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[military protocol droid]] that was programmed in warfare and politics, making him a valuable [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]]<ref name="CSWE" /> to the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] he served<ref name="Rebellion" /> with the assistance of [[SD-7 (Galactic Empire)|SD-7]] messenger [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. IMP-22 was [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in form, with [[Color/Legends|red]] plating<ref name="CSWE" /> and a single white, visor-like [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptor]]. He was slightly arrogant, but seemed to have full confidence in the skill of his master. Nevertheless, IMP-22 offered his advice whenever he could, though he became short-tempered if his commander displayed any signs of incompetence.<ref name="Rebellion" />

==Behind the scenes==
IMP-22 is voiced by [[Milton James]] in [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']].
